data.Name: Drogon - Full FMU Workflow Template (ERT → RMS → OPM Flow)
data.Description: Comprehensive ActivityTemplate for the Drogon FMU reservoir model. Captures the complete input-to-output pipeline for one decision gate: seismic + horizons + wells + stratigraphy + uncertainty distributions → ERT orchestration (DESIGN2PARAMS → RMS MAIN → OPM Flow) → volumes, production profiles, maps, grid properties. Based on the official equinor/fmu-drogon tutorial model (24.3.1). 250 realisations, one-by-one sensitivity design.

ParameterTemplates.Title: SeismicData
ParameterTemplates.Description: 3D/4D seismic interpretation data used for facies conditioning (near/far offset, amplitude/RelAI). Static 3D vintage and 3 monitor 4D surveys.

ParameterTemplates.Title: Horizons
ParameterTemplates.Description: Structural horizon surfaces: TopVolantis, TopTherys, TopVolon, BaseVolantis. Input to RMS structural model and Eclipse grid.

ParameterTemplates.Title: StratigraphicColumn
ParameterTemplates.Description: Stratigraphic column defining the Volantis Group: Valysar Fm, Therys Fm, Volon Fm. Used for zone definitions and facies grouping.

ParameterTemplates.Title: Wells
ParameterTemplates.Description: Well data: appraisal (55_33-1), producers (A1-A4), injectors (A5-A6), RFT reference (R_A2..R_A6). Includes trajectories, logs, completions.

ParameterTemplates.Title: ReservoirProperties
ParameterTemplates.Description: Reference petrophysical properties per formation and facies: porosity, permeability, Kv/Kh, J-functions, PVT, fluid contacts per region.

ParameterTemplates.Title: FaultModel
ParameterTemplates.Description: Fault framework with 7 regions and fault seal scaling (LOGUNIF 0.1–10). Includes multregt template.

ParameterTemplates.Title: Observations
ParameterTemplates.Description: History matching observations: WBHP, RFT, WCT, GOR, tracers, 4D seismic, PLT data.

ParameterTemplates.Title: ErtConfig
ParameterTemplates.Description: ERT configuration: drogon_design.ert defining the full forward model chain, LSF queue settings, random seed, and run parameters.

ParameterTemplates.Title: DesignMatrix
ParameterTemplates.Description: Design matrix Excel file (design_matrix_one_by_one.xlsx): DesignSheet01 with one-by-one sensitivity layout, DefaultValues sheet.

ParameterTemplates.Title: UncertaintyParameters
ParameterTemplates.Description: Uncertainty parameter distributions from global_variables.dist: Kv/Kh, FWL, GOC, fault seal, relperm interpolation, APS facies probabilities.

ParameterTemplates.Title: ModelSwitches
ParameterTemplates.Description: Model alternative switches: DCONV, HUM, PETROMODEL, FACIESMODEL, seismic conditioning, facies belts.

ParameterTemplates.Title: FmuConfig
ParameterTemplates.Description: fmuconfig global_variables.yml: complete model parameterisation including dates, seismic paths, grids, regions, facies, petro constants, J-functions, relperm.

ParameterTemplates.Title: ForwardModelChain
ParameterTemplates.Description: Ordered list of ERT forward models: DESIGN2PARAMS → DESIGN_KW → RMS → ECLCOMPRESS → OPM_FLOW → export_tables → export_maps → export_ecl_roff → sim2seis.

ParameterTemplates.Title: NumberOfRealizations
ParameterTemplates.Description: Number of realisations (250 for one-by-one design).

ParameterTemplates.Title: RmsProject
ParameterTemplates.Description: RMS project and workflow definition: project name, version, workflow (MAIN).

ParameterTemplates.Title: EclipseDataTemplate
ParameterTemplates.Description: Eclipse/OPM DATA file template (DROGON_HIST.DATA) with INCLUDEs for grid, props, schedule.

ParameterTemplates.Title: HookWorkflows
ParameterTemplates.Description: ERT hook workflows: fmuconfig update, fmuobs YAML creation, case metadata via dataio.

ParameterTemplates.Title: InputParameterTable
ParameterTemplates.Description: OSDU ColumnBasedTable WPC with per-realisation input parameters (OWC depths + porosity).

ParameterTemplates.Title: GeoModelDataspace
ParameterTemplates.Description: RDDMS ETP dataspace holding the Drogon geomodel EPC files (structural model, shared DG1/DG2).

ParameterTemplates.Title: OutputParameterTable
ParameterTemplates.Description: Generated per-realisation input parameter table (ColumnBasedTable WPC).

ParameterTemplates.Title: OutputVolumesRaw
ParameterTemplates.Description: Per-realisation reservoir estimated volumes (RAW REV WPC) - by region, zone, and facies.

ParameterTemplates.Title: OutputVolumesStats
ParameterTemplates.Description: Statistical aggregation P10/P50/P90 of volumes across realisations (STAT REV WPC).

ParameterTemplates.Title: OutputProductionForecast
ParameterTemplates.Description: Field and well production profiles (rates, cumulatives, pressures) as ColumnBasedTable WPC.

ParameterTemplates.Title: OutputMaps
ParameterTemplates.Description: HC thickness maps and average parameter maps (regular surface grids).

ParameterTemplates.Title: OutputGridProperties
ParameterTemplates.Description: Eclipse grid properties exported to ROFF: restart parameters, init properties.

ParameterTemplates.Title: OutputSim2Seis
ParameterTemplates.Description: Synthetic seismic computed from simulation results for 4D comparison.

ParameterTemplates.Title: OutputWellData
ParameterTemplates.Description: RFT pressure data, tracer breakthrough, well completion data.

ParameterTemplates.Title: OutputEclipseTables
ParameterTemplates.Description: Eclipse-derived tables: saturation functions, PVT, VFP, group tree, summary vectors.

ParameterTemplates.Title: VolumeEstimates
ParameterTemplates.Description: P50 volume estimates link to statistical REV WPC record.

ParameterTemplates.Title: ProductionProfileP50
ParameterTemplates.Description: P50 production profile link to ColumnBasedTable WPC with real OPM Flow output.

ParameterTemplates.Title: ReservoirRecord
ParameterTemplates.Description: OSDU Reservoir master-data record for the Drogon field.

ParameterTemplates.Title: DevelopmentConcept
ParameterTemplates.Description: DG2 Development Concept WPC record.
